title: Shadow Man

notes: Works perfectly, no issues. Didn't have to rename anything, either.
title: Shadow Man

notes: Tested setup and a bit of gameplay. Everything works out of the box.
title: Shadow Man

notes: Works perfectly like native port in 1080p. Xbox One S gamepad works out of the box, but the game don't recognize LT, RT and right analog stick, so I recommend using additional software like AntiMicro to set up the gamepad.
title: Shadow Man

notes:
Games menus work, but as soon as I try to load level, it quits game and shows this in terminal:     

"wine: Unhandled page fault on write access to 0xffffffbf at address 0x4fb102 (thread 0009), starting debugger...
Unhandled exception: page fault on write access to 0xffffffbf in 32-bit code (0x004fb102)."    

At least on my second computer running the same os this doesn't happen. Everything just works.
